name: Treadmill
description: A circular loop of grid cells that shifts boxes one position forward each time the player taps any box. Each position is fixed as open or closed — boxes adopt the revealed/hidden state of their current position. Empty slots persist and move along with everything else.
howToPlay: Open the Level Editor and use the Treadmill tool to draw a loop of cells on the grid. Click cells to add them to the path, click existing path cells to toggle open/closed, right-click to remove. Place boxes on treadmill cells and non-treadmill cells, then hit Test Play. Every tap shifts the treadmill one step forward.
author: Claude

showcaseLevel.name: Treadmill Demo
showcaseLevel.desc: A simple treadmill loop with alternating open/closed positions
